authority_boundary: Source registry for validator.microcosm.axiom_support_cover freshness-state ordering; it classifies reproducible support-case basis state and explicitly refuses to certify live freshness without a source-owned refresh contract.

unknown_live_freshness_no_refresh_contra.meaning: The evaluator has deterministic basis and rederive metadata, but no source-owned freshness contract or live refresh check for the cited support material.
unknown_live_freshness_no_refresh_contra.claim_effect: Keeps the freshness component uncomputed for support strength; it is an ordered unknown, not proof.

source_refresh_contract_checked.meaning: Reserved for a future source-owned refresh contract whose checker verifies support material freshness against declared invalidation rules.
source_refresh_contract_checked.claim_effect: May classify freshness only when a validator consumes the refresh contract; it still cannot bypass evidence, provenance, domain, authority, projection, or rejection-mapping ceilings.

non_laundering_rules: A deterministic basis digest is reproducibility metadata, not live freshness proof.
Current file existence, endpoint coverage, receipt presence, generated support output, and generated projections cannot become freshness proof.
The reserved source_refresh_contract_checked value cannot be emitted until a source-owned refresh contract and validator check exist.
Freshness classification cannot raise an axiom above the meet of positive support and anti-axiom rejection mapping.
unknown_policy: When no source-owned refresh contract exists, the validator emits unknown_live_freshness_no_refresh_contract as an ordered unknown and keeps a ceiling_component_uncomputed:freshness_state witness gap.
anti_claims: This registry removes the no-order-owner gap for freshness_state; it does not certify live freshness.
This registry does not verify exact_obligation_rejection or subsumes_obligation mapping.
This registry does not authorize public release, source mutation, or strong axiom claims.
